text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8vo.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz √† <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> ohngebunden √† <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anfäng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Rappen,</PRIZE></BIBL> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1) Closed the unclosed <BIBL> around \"Memoires de Rochester\" (it was wrongly wrapping the following Maupertuis entry). 2) Changed <PRICE> tag to <PRIZE> for consistency (closing tag was </PRICE> which made the XML inconsistent with the rest). 3) Moved the final \"und viele andere mehr...\" phrase outside the last <BIBL>, since it is a general closing remark, not part of the bibliographic entry. 4) Attempted to decode the garbled Unicode escape sequences (e.g. groß, 8vo., Anfäng, Würmen, Gespräch) so the text is readable while preserving the original markup structure."}

parsed.explanation: 1) Closed the unclosed <BIBL> around "Memoires de Rochester" (it was wrongly wrapping the following Maupertuis entry). 2) Changed <PRICE> tag to <PRIZE> for consistency (closing tag was </PRICE> which made the XML inconsistent with the rest). 3) Moved the final "und viele andere mehr..." phrase outside the last <BIBL>, since it is a general closing remark, not part of the bibliographic entry. 4) Attempted to decode the garbled Unicode escape sequences (e.g. groß, 8vo., Anfäng, Würmen, Gespräch) so the text is readable while preserving the original markup structure.
